extraction.ocr_text:
Human in the loop

Failed Match

Validate
Documents

Inputs:
• in_SuggestedResponse
  (Email draft by Agent)
• in_DocumentsHTML
  (Invoice/PO side by side)
• in_InvoicePDF
• in_POID

Outputs:
• App Action: “Approved” or “Rejected”
• out_ApproverResponse
  (Text of rejection email to supplier
  edited by reviewer)
extraction.description: This screenshot is an informational slide or diagram rather than a live UiPath product interface. It illustrates the human validation step in the Invoice Matching with IXP flow, showing a failed match being routed to a "Validate Documents" human-in-the-loop stage. The diagram lists the inputs passed into validation and the outputs returned after the reviewer approves or rejects the invoice.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows that when invoice matching fails, the process sends the suggested response, side-by-side invoice/PO HTML, invoice PDF, and PO ID into a human validation step, which returns an app action of “Approved” or “Rejected” and an edited approver response.
